name: WeatherSpecialist
description: An agent specialized in weather intelligence, forecasts, and safety guidance.

skills.name: Current Conditions
skills.description: Reports hardcoded current weather snapshots for supported cities.

skills.name: 3-Day Forecast
skills.description: Shares a hardcoded 3-day outlook including highs, lows, and precipitation chance.

skills.name: Weather Alerts
skills.description: Returns hardcoded severe weather advisories and impact windows.

skills.name: Activity Guidance
skills.description: Suggests outdoor/indoor activity plans based on weather conditions.
